K

KeyHandler - Class in controller
Class to handle what to do every time a key is pressed
KeyHandler(JBomberMan) - Constructor for class controller.KeyHandler
Class constructor
keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
Method to manage the events to activate when a key of the keyboard is pressed in each of the states of the game
keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
Method to manage the release of a key
keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class controller.KeyHandler
 
knockBack(Monster) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Handles the beginning of the knock-back changing the player direction and speed and setting the knock-back flag to true.
